# Changes — <NNN-feature-name>

<!-- The running implementation log the delivery loop appends to per increment.
     Newest entry FIRST. One entry per increment, written when the increment's
     verify step passes — not before. -->

## <date> — increment <n>: <one-line summary>

**Changed**: <files touched, one line each, with the one-phrase why>
**Verified**: <build/test evidence: command + result, e.g. "unit tests 42/42; db_map shows no DRIFT">
**Graph impact**: <new/changed topics, tables, endpoints — or "none">
**Follow-ups**: <anything deliberately deferred, or "none">
